We propose BiCrossMamba-ST, a robust framework for speech deepfake detection...

question: In the context of the experimental setup described for the BiCrossMamba-ST, what is the primary purpose of this model?

options.A: BiCrossMamba-ST is primarily focused on translating speech from one language to another accurately.
options.B: BiCrossMamba-ST is primarily used for improving the quality of speech synthesis in text-to-speech systems.
options.C: BiCrossMamba-ST is primarily designed for detecting deepfake content in speech to ensure authenticity.
options.D: BiCrossMamba-ST is primarily designed for enhancing speech recognition accuracy in noisy environments.

explanation: BiCrossMamba-ST is described as a robust framework for speech deepfake detection, indicating its primary use is in identifying and handling fake speech content, not enhancing speech recognition, improving speech synthesis, or translating speech.
